hooks.command: echo 'BLOCKED: Agent spawning is prohibited. You must do all work yourself directly. See CLAUDE.md ABSOLUTE RULES.' >&2 && exit 2
echo 'BLOCKED: Team creation is prohibited. You must do all work yourself directly. See CLAUDE.md ABSOLUTE RULES.' >&2 && exit 2
echo 'BLOCKED: Agent messaging is prohibited. You must do all work yourself directly. See CLAUDE.md ABSOLUTE RULES.' >&2 && exit 2

S=/tmp/shadow_pbcopy_done; if [ -f "$S" ] && [ $(( $(date +%s) - $(stat -f %m "$S") )) -lt 300 ]; then rm -f "$S"; exit 0; fi; echo 'CLIPBOARD REMINDER: You did NOT copy your response to clipboard. CLAUDE.md requires this for every response. Run: echo "your response text" | pbcopy — Do it now before Reid reads your reply.'

echo '** CONTEXT WAS JUST COMPACTED ** Your working memory has been cleared. You MUST invoke /context-lost right now before doing anything else. That skill contains your complete recovery procedure. Do not proceed with any work until you have followed it fully.'
